## Affected Item

- Guideline, flowchart, or RoB tool id:
- Source URL or citation:

## Problem

What is wrong or incomplete?

## Expected Data

Quote or summarize the expected source-backed value.

## Observed Data

Paste the `reportilo` output or describe where it appears.

## Affected Surface

- [ ] R package
- [ ] Bundled Shiny app
- [ ] Browser app
- [ ] Exported Word/Excel/CSV/image file

## Provenance Notes

If possible, include the source document version, page, table, item number, or
download date.
